text: To live without hope is to cease to live.
author: Dostoevsky

text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
author: Socrates

text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
author: Aristotle

text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
author: Socrates

text: It is not in the stars to hold our destiny but in ourselves.
author: Shakespeare

text: The world breaks everyone, and afterward many are strong at the broken places.
author: Hemingway

text: There is no greatness where there is not simplicity, goodness, and truth.
author: Tolstoy

text: Not all those who wander are lost.
author: Tolkien

text: Whatever you are, be a good one.
author: Lincoln

text: The cave you fear to enter holds the treasure you seek.
author: Campbell

text: I would rather have questions that can't be answered than answers that can't be questioned.
author: Feynman
